response.original_title: How much does Wells Fargo charge to transfer money to another bank? [Start→Support→Now]
response.overview: Understanding +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] the costs associated with moving money is vital for avoiding unexpected banking fees. Wells +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] Fargo has different pricing structures based on the speed and type of transfer. While +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] some transfers are free, others may require a small service charge to process. Knowing +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] these fees beforehand helps you choose the most economical way to send your funds. Review +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] the following guide to stay informed about current transfer costs for your accounts. Standard and Digital Wires Standard +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] ACH transfers to linked external accounts are generally free for most personal banking customers. However, +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] domestic digital wire transfers typically carry a fee of $25 per outgoing transaction.
